choice: Per-row account column with remembered alias→Account mapping (recommended)
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Per-row account-identifier column. On import, match each distinct identifier to an existing Account by a saved alias; unmatched identifiers drop into the same one-time mapping step we already use for E*TRADE first-connect (map to existing Account or create new), and the mapping is remembered for next time.)
